## Summary

<!-- 2-3 sentences: what are you adding or updating, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New document
- [ ] Update existing document
- [ ] New ADR
- [ ] Fill in stub content
- [ ] Fix cross-references or links
- [ ] Structural / governance change

## Document checklist

- [ ] Version number incremented in the document header
- [ ] Edit log updated at the bottom of every modified document
- [ ] Numbered heading style used (1 / 1.1 / 1.1.1)
- [ ] Cross-references to other kalpa-docs documents point to correct paths
- [ ] Cross-references to service repos link to correct branch/path
- [ ] ADR format follows `adrs/ADR-000-template.md` (if applicable)

## Scope check

<!-- Does this change belong here, or in a service repo?
     See repo-governance.md §4 for the decision matrix. -->

- [ ] Confirmed: this is cross-service or system-level content (belongs in kalpa-docs)
- [ ] Service-specific content has been noted for the relevant service repo `/docs/`
